title: generate_fresh_address map_err closure has broken indentation
description: The map_err closure on diversified_address has the body at the same indent level as map_err itself rather than one level in. Cosmetic but inconsistent with the next_diversifier map_err directly above it. Suggested rewrite: align closure body two more spaces to match the existing style.
close_reason: cargo fmt confirmed indentation is canonical; opinion label correct
